task_completion.description: Create the initial solid base block with dimensions 100mm x 60mm x 30mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SolveSpace 3D viewport or sketch showing a rectangle with dimension constraints of 100 and 60, and an extrusion property of 30.

task_completion.description: Hollow out the interior of the base to leave a 2mm wall thickness and 2mm floor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cavity/pocket cut into the base block. Sketch constraints showing dimensions of 96x56 (or 2mm offsets from the outer edge) and an extrusion/difference depth of 28mm.

task_completion.description: Create four cylindrical mounting standoffs inside the cavity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four solid cylinders visible inside the hollowed cavity. Sketch constraints showing an 8mm diameter (or 4mm radius) and an extrusion height of 10mm.

task_completion.description: Position the four standoffs at coordinates (±42, ±22) relative to the center.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dimension constraints in the standoff sketch showing horizontal distances of 42mm and vertical distances of 22mm from the central origin axes to the center of the circles.

task_completion.description: Create a concentric 3mm diameter blind pilot hole that is 10mm deep in each standoff.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Holes visible in the center of each standoff cylinder. Sketch constraints showing a 3mm diameter (or 1.5mm radius) and a difference/cut operation with a depth of 10mm.
The SolveSpace window title bar showing 'pcb_enclosure.slvs' or a save dialog confirming the file is being saved to the /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to design the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application interface (3D viewport, property browser, toolbars) being actively used to construct the geometry.

integrity.description: The 3D model is genuinely constructed using sketches and boolean operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The property browser on the left side of SolveSpace shows a history of groups (e.g., Sketch, Extrude, Difference) corresponding to the step-by-step design process.

integrity.description: The agent started from a blank canvas rather than opening a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Early screenshots show an empty SolveSpace canvas or the creation of the very first sketch, rather than immediately loading a completed or partially completed model.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output file path: /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/pcb_enclosure.slvs. Base dimensions: 100mm width, 60mm depth, 30mm extrusion. Cavity dimensions: 96mm width, 56mm depth, 28mm extrusion (leaving 2mm walls and floor). Standoffs: 8mm diameter, 10mm extrusion, positioned at X=±42, Y=±22 from center. Pilot holes: 3mm diameter, 10mm extrusion (cut).
